The '''''Devout''''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|battle cruiser]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the years of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Along with the [[Reliant (cruiser)|''Reliant'']], it was sent to the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] to enforce the [[Emergency Powers Act/Legends|Emergency Powers Act]] after the [[Almas Academy]] engaged the [[Right of Denial]].

{{Ship-stub}}
